meta.title: Projects
meta.subtitle: A collection of real-world, academic, and personal projects focused on backend systems, full stack applications, and cloud deployments.
meta.description: Detailed portfolio of projects showcasing problem solving, system design, backend architecture, database modeling, and cloud-native development.

projects.title: College Management System
projects.shortDescription: A modular web-based system to manage students, faculty, academics, and administrative workflows.
projects.longDescription: The College Management System is a full stack application designed to digitize and streamline academic and administrative operations. It supports role-based access for admins, faculty, and students, manages academic records, and provides reporting features for decision-making.

problem.summary: Manual handling of academic records caused inefficiencies, data inconsistency, and limited accessibility for students and faculty.
problem.whyItMatters: Educational institutions require reliable digital systems to manage data efficiently and reduce administrative overhead.

solution.approach: Designed a role-based web application with a centralized database and RESTful APIs.
solution.architecture: Layered architecture separating controllers, services, repositories, and database models.
solution.tradeoffs: Chose a relational database for data consistency at the cost of higher schema rigidity.

features.title: Role-Based Authentication
features.description: Implemented secure login and authorization for admins, faculty, and students.
features.impact: Improved data security and access control

features.title: Academic Records Management
features.description: Centralized management of student profiles, courses, and results.

challenges.challenge: Designing a flexible schema for diverse academic data.
challenges.solution: Normalized database design with clear entity relationships.
challenges.learning: Proper schema planning prevents future refactoring.

gallery.caption: Student profile and academic record management

videos.caption: Complete walkthrough of the College Management System

confidentiality.notes: Project was developed for academic evaluation and demonstration.

projects.title: Portfolio and Blog Platform
projects.shortDescription: A personal portfolio website with structured content, blogs, and dynamic rendering.
projects.longDescription: This project is a personal portfolio platform built to showcase projects, blogs, journey, and achievements using structured JSON data and Markdown rendering for content scalability.

problem.summary: Traditional portfolio websites lack scalability and structured content management.
problem.whyItMatters: A developer portfolio should scale with content and reflect real engineering practices.

solution.approach: Used JSON-driven content and Markdown rendering to separate data from UI.
solution.architecture: Component-based frontend with structured data files.
solution.tradeoffs: Static content approach requires rebuilds for updates but improves performance.

features.title: Markdown-Based Blogs
features.description: Blogs written in Markdown and rendered dynamically in React.

features.title: Structured JSON Content
features.description: All sections driven by validated JSON schemas.

challenges.solution: Introduced extensible custom fields in all schemas.
challenges.learning: Schema design is as important as UI design.

metrics.performance: Fast load times due to static rendering
metrics.scale: Easily supports hundreds of blog posts
metrics.reliability: Low failure surface with static hosting

confidentiality.notes: Personal project with public source code and demo.
